components.name: D-glucose
components.evidence: AW271 and CJ263 were cultivated in shake flasks with M9 minimal media supplemented with equimolar p-coumarate, ferulate, and glucose (20 mM each), and glucose was fed every 24 hours to a concentration of 20 mM.

components.name: p-coumarate (p-coumaric acid)
components.evidence: cultivated in shake flasks with M9 minimal media supplemented with equimolar p-coumarate, ferulate, and glucose (20 mM each)

components.name: ferulate (ferulic acid)
components.evidence: cultivated in shake flasks with M9 minimal media supplemented with equimolar p-coumarate, ferulate, and glucose (20 mM each)

components.name: disodium phosphate (Na2HPO4)
components.evidence: M9 media used consisted of glucose ... Na2HPO4 (13.5 g/liter), KH2PO4 (6 g/liter), NaCl (1 g/liter), (NH4)2SO4 (2.25 g/liter), 2 mM MgSO4, 0.1 mM CaCl2, and 0.018 mM FeSO4.

components.evidence: M9 media used consisted of glucose ... Na2HPO4 (13.5 g/liter), KH2PO4 (6 g/liter), NaCl (1 g/liter), (NH4)2SO4 (2.25 g/liter), 2 mM MgSO4, 0.1 mM CaCl2, and 0.018 mM FeSO4.

components.name: O2 (aerobic gas phase, shaken flask)
components.evidence: AW271 and CJ263 were cultivated in shake flasks ... (aerobic aromatic-catabolism host P. putida KT2440, cultivated shaken)

media.base_medium: M9 minimal (full salt composition stated in-text; no separate trace-element or vitamin stock cited)

sources_chased.what: M9 salt/trace composition (Batch phase media preparation section)
added: exact g/L for Na2HPO4, KH2PO4, NaCl, (NH4)2SO4

sources_chased.what: any cited base-medium reference for M9 / trace-element mix / vitamins
added: none — the paper cites no base medium and adds no trace-metal mix or vitamins beyond FeSO4

media.notes: This M9 for P. putida KT2440 is fully defined in the main text (Batch phase media preparation), with only FeSO4 as a trace metal and NO trace-element mix or vitamins; the shake-flask medium adds 20 mM each of glucose, p-coumarate, and ferulate. Corrections vs current_components: the spurious trace metals Co2+, Cu2+, Fe3+, Mn2+, and Zn2+ (GEM exchange auto-population artifacts, lb -1000) are NOT in the real recipe and were removed; the only iron species is Fe2+ from FeSO4; concentrations for all salts and substrates were recovered and filled in.
